titleStmt.title: SII 8.403: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 403. (A.R. No. 117 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TILAKESVARA TEMPLE AT DEVIPATTANAM, SAME TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ civikkiramapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu nāḷ 6 10 3- ṉāl māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaikkoyil paḷḷiaṟaikkūṭattup paḷḷippiṭaṅ kāliṅkarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu cevvirukkaināṭṭuc ciṟukaṭaṟkaraic cetumulam pokiśva ramāṉa tiruñāṉacampantaṉtaḷattu Uṭaiya pokiśva ramuṭaiyār koyiṟ tāṉattār ceyyattiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Uṭaiyār poki
śva ramuṭaiyārkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭun nimantaṅkaḷukku Innāṭṭup puṟakkuṭiyāṉa civallavapaṭṭiṉamuṅ karaiyun tuṟaiyum nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa Iṭattil Iṟuttuvaruṅ kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum taruvatāṉaaccum poṉvariyum kaikkāṇiyum kaiytiṭṭum paṭipaccai viṉiyokamum Ukavai peruvari tiruveḻucci tiruaviṣekaukavai kaṟpūravilai kāriyavārāṭci kuṟṟattaṇṭam pañcupili cantivikkiramappeṟu veṭṭi muṭṭāvāḷ Ec
coṟu kūṟṟarici Iṭaittuṟai cekkiṟai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭoḷippāṭṭam tuṟailal Eṟuvaṉa Iṟaṅkuvaṉa Eṭuppaṉa niṟuppaṉa virippaṉa piṭippaṉa Aḷappaṉa mukappaṉa Aḻukaṟcarakku Aṅkāṭippāṭṭam Uṭpaṭṭa pāṭṭaṅkaḷum ciṟṟāyam perāyamum maraiṟai talaiyoppu matimātavari toṇikkaṭamai keṭupātai yuṟupātai maramaccātivilaip patuvāraṅ kāṉāṭṭu pirāttiyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uā portion is built in here.
Āṉṉamaiyil Ittevaṟkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭun nimantaṅkaḷukku Innāṭṭup puṟakkuṭiyāṉa civallavapaṭṭiṉamum karaiyun tuṟaiyun nāṉkellaikkuṭppaṭṭa Iṭattil Iṟuttuvaruṅ kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum taruvatāṉaaccum poṉvariyuṅ kaikkāṇiyum kaitiṭṭum paṭipaccai viṉiyokamum Ukavai peruvari tiruveḻuccit tiruaviṣekaukavai kaṟā portion is built in here.
ttuṟai cekkiṟai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭoḷippāṭṭam tuṟaiyil Eṟuvaṉa Iṟakkuvaṉa Eṭuppaṉa niṟuppaṉa virippaṉa piṭippaṉa Aḷappaṉa mukappaṉa Aḻukaṟcarakku Aṅkāṭippāṭṭam Uṭpaṭṭa pāṭṭaṅkaḷum ciṟṟāyam peṟāyamum maraiṟai talaiyoppu mati mātavāri toṇikaṭamai keṭupātai yuṟupātai maramaccātivilaip patuvāraṅkāṉāṭṭup pirāttiyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa nāā portion is built in here.
c coṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭuvitittukkoḷka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār ...� Ivai tirumal lināṭṭut taṭaṅkaṇṇiciṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ Uyyaniṉṟāṭuvāṉ viracoḻatevaṉāṉa vāṇātarājaṉeṉ Eḻuttu ...
Digital edition of SII 8.403 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
